subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast sacrificed thy spirit and heart, thy being and essence, thy substance and all thou possessest in the path of the resplendent Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من فدی روحه و فواده و ذاته و کینونته و ماله و علیه فی سبیل جمال اشرقت
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @firmness in the Covenant, @law of obligatory prayer
